name: schedule-manager
description: 개발 일정 및 프롬프트 관리 웹 애플리케이션
author: Development Team

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd src/frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.db:setup: cd src/backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.db:push: cd src/backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd src/backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd src/backend && npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy:pages
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && cd src/frontend && npm run clean && cd ../backend && npm run clean
